emails.subject:
RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.subject_base:
P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.body: RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of business (Feb1-9) Sean, I came up with a $3936 difference between this and your wire requests. The wire requests were on the high side. I am sending it off to Houston with a note that we may need to revise it. Steve

emails.subject:
RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.subject_base:
P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.body: RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of business (Feb1-9) Steve, The difference is because I rounded the purchase prices from AEP and Avista in the P&L spreadsheet, rather than taking a weighted average. The wire request amount is correct.

emails.subject:
RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.subject_base:
P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of
 business (Feb1-9)
emails.body: RE: P&L associated with Avista transaction to cover NW book of business (Feb1-9) As long as the wire amount is OK, I don't think Houston will catch on.
